discrepancies.title: AAR (Archive of Automated Reasoning) substrate-citation contamination
discrepancies.verification_method: web_search via Bing for 'Archive of Automated Reasoning journal peer-reviewed ISSN editorial board Lean formalization' — result: not indexed in any mainstream science catalog; not a recognized peer-reviewed journal
discrepancies.origin_trace: CLI agent introduced 'AAR safest fallback' as Q-205-1 prior in PROMPT 205 consultation drafting; acronym propagated through Q-205-2 / Q-205-5 priors and into downstream artefacts (triage matrix v1.4 + L2 pivot v1.1)
remediation_applied: triage matrix v1.4 → v1.5: AAR removed from §B Item 8 rationale + §H points 3/4/5 + §I cascade-3; substituted JFR primary + ITP/CPP next-deadline fallback
L2 pivot direction v1.1 → v1.2: §5 Tunnell-CNP-fallback AAR-alternate REMOVED; substituted to JFR + 12-mo JAR cool-off caveat
PROMPT 205 prompt file renamed to _EXECUTED with original AAR references preserved as historical record
discrepancies.memory_promotion_candidate: Promote new memory: 'AAR (Archive of Automated Reasoning) is NOT a recognized peer-reviewed venue; pre-verify external venue identifiers analog to DOI/arXiv-ID rule'

discrepancies.title: Item 16 Spectral Classes venue order: synth flips CLI prior JNT → JTNB primary
discrepancies.rationale_synth: JTNB more receptive to experimentally-anchored arithmetic + shorter desk-screening cycle; JNT increasing desk-rejection-heavy under current editorial regime
discrepancies.risk_flag_synth: Adamczewski-editor-check required: if JTNB editor for continued-fractions/Diophantine content is Adamczewski, swap primary to JNT or Bull. LMS (Item 22 6 May 2026 was Adamczewski-content-mute JTNB rejection)
discrepancies.remediation_applied: triage matrix v1.5 §B Item 3 updated to JTNB primary > JNT > Bull. LMS with editor-check warning

discrepancies.title: Flagship arXiv-endorsement dependency: factual correction (Q-205-6)
discrepancies.factual_state: Inventiones / IMRN / Compositio do NOT require arXiv preprints at submission
discrepancies.implication: arXiv-endorsement gap is NOT a flagship-cutoff blocker per scope card v1.1; specifically an Indag-class venue blocker only
discrepancies.supersedes_priors: UF-204-2 framing of arXiv-endorsement as ACTIVE flagship blocker downgraded to MEDIUM-priority background quest
discrepancies.remediation_applied: triage matrix v1.5 §I cascade-1 reframed accordingly

discrepancies.title: Q-205-9 single-highest-leverage CLI prior FLIPPED: Item 21 > Item 18
discrepancies.cli_prior: Item 18 SIARC PDE → JFR after sorry-reduction work-pass (~1-2 weeks Lean work) was nominated as single highest-leverage redirect
discrepancies.synth_verdict: Item 21 Tunnell CNP → JFR (no pre-resubmit work; manuscript stable; deposit zenodo.19834824 stable; can fire within 72h) is higher-leverage per leverage-per-unit-effort criterion
discrepancies.additional_value: Item 21 fire yields immediate venue-test data on JFR Lean-submission behavior particularly for Lean papers <1000 lines, which informs Item 18 venue choice downstream
discrepancies.remediation_applied: triage matrix v1.5 §J Q-205-9 LOCK reflects flip; SQL board priority updated
